articles.title: Moody: 'Looks like we're needing to consider a reset' on captaincy
articles.description: LSG director of cricket says they will review every department as they "haven't lived up to the expectation"

articles.title: Shreyas Iyer's maiden IPL ton keeps Punjab Kings in the hunt for playoffs spot
articles.description: The PBKS skipper helped break their six-match losing streak, as they sealed a chase of 200 against a depleted Lucknow Super Giants to breach the top four on the points table again

articles.title: Devine intervention brings New Zealand back from the dead
articles.description: Pitch-perfect 87 from veteran rescues team from turmoil at 11 for 4, to square series

articles.title: SRH win big but RCB, GT seal top two spots
articles.description: Fifties from Kishan, Klaasen and Abhishek propelled SRH to a massive score, but RCB ensured their net run-rate stayed good enough to take them to Qualifier 1

articles.title: Babar back for ODIs vs Australia; uncapped Rohail, Minhas and Daniyal called up
articles.description: Shadab Khan and Naseem Shah also returned for three-match series, while Mohammad Rizwan was omitted

articles.title: Exiled Afghanistan women to tour England during T20 World Cup
articles.description: Afghan Refugee Women's Team will start their tour on June 22

articles.title: Taijul takes six as Bangladesh complete 2-0 sweep
articles.description: Rizwan's 94 went in vain as Pakistan fell 78 short of their target of 437

articles.title: Bumrah rested for Afghanistan Test; Rahul replaces Pant as vice-captain
articles.description: Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli are in the ODI squad as India build towards the 2027 World Cup

articles.title: MJK Smith, former England and Warwickshire captain, dies aged 92
articles.description: Batter led England in 25 of his 50 Tests, and also claimed an England cap as a fly-half in rugby union

articles.title: R Ashwin points out mistake in RCB’s plan during heavy defeat to SRH
articles.description: RCB lost to the SRH by 55 runs at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium on Friday, May 22. However, Rajat Patidar and Co. confirmed their spot at the top of the points table.

articles.title: Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah lays foundation stone for new 80,000-seater stadium near Bengaluru
articles.description: Bengaluru is poised to get a new 80,000-seater stadium, which will become India’s second-largest cricket ground after the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

articles.title: ICC pondering red to pink ball switch during Tests
articles.description: International cricket could witness quite a few changes in the coming days, with new rules and regulations being mulled.
